reviews.review_description: Just got this. Very cool relaxing puzzle game. Gentle music in the background. Solve the puzzle by manipulating 3D shapes to create shadows that match the design. Very relaxing yet challenging. This is a great addition If you like puzzle games.

What a beautiful, calm, and elegant puzzle game. It promotes spatial thinking and is so much fun. Anyone who enjoys intelligent, well-designed, and tranquil puzzle games will find joy in this game as well.
